[2020-11-21 04:49] masn6811 (Masne98888): i believe last time i proposed it i suggested somewhere aorund turn 5
[2020-11-21 04:50] jamberine: I'm just trying to think of what degenerate lines can happen earlier
[2020-11-21 04:51] jamberine: it's more elegant if there's no turn limit
[2020-11-21 04:52] masn6811 (Masne98888): doomed conduit, drone conduit, threatening bolt?
[2020-11-21 04:52] masn6811 (Masne98888): dd/dc/db threatening plasma if one of these drones is an alt/auric?
[2020-11-21 04:52] masn6811 (Masne98888): honestly dont seem that bad
[2020-11-21 04:53] masn6811 (Masne98888): dd/cc allowing a super fast zemo?
[2020-11-21 04:53] jamberine: is that comparable to turn 1 alt drone conduit
[2020-11-21 04:53] masn6811 (Masne98888): fab rush? hneslty none of these seem too bad
[2020-11-21 04:53] masn6811 (Masne98888): on the other hand, turn 1 alt/drone conduit -> DD allows you to get a fast zemo without gimping your economy
[2020-11-21 04:56] jamberine: probably something stupid in venge cluster but that's stupid anyway
[2020-11-21 04:58] jamberine: with your proposed dynamo it lets you sell your one green on 4, but that seems fine
[2020-11-21 04:58] masn6811 (Masne98888): we can try no turn limit and see if anything broken happens
[2020-11-21 05:04] jamberine: any thoughts on feral warden
[2020-11-21 05:06] masn6811 (Masne98888): i mean, its a bit strong, but i dont have any ideas for a nerf
[2020-11-21 05:06] masn6811 (Masne98888): and i dont see the degenerate bso p1 feral rush often
[2020-11-21 05:07] jamberine: I feel like it happens in at least half the sets without a bigger absorber
[2020-11-21 05:08] masn6811 (Masne98888): i guess. what do you propose tho?
[2020-11-21 05:08] masn6811 (Masne98888): it'd still be playable
[2020-11-21 05:09] jamberine: yeah nerfs don't look good
[2020-11-21 05:10] jamberine: it would still be bought
[2020-11-21 05:13] jamberine: I was thinking maybe shrink it and make it 2 health
[2020-11-21 05:13] jamberine: my first thought was 3GR
[2020-11-21 05:13] jamberine: -2 gold for -1 prompt health
[2020-11-21 05:13] jamberine: but obviously you jstu spam that
[2020-11-21 05:13] masn6811 (Masne98888): yeah, i was thinking even 4GR for 2hp is too spammable
[2020-11-21 05:13] jamberine: so that's not reasonable at all
[2020-11-21 05:15] jamberine: even if it is like hellhound power level it doesn't feel like a unit you should be spamming
[2020-11-21 05:16] jamberine: how does gaussite pivot affect scorch
[2020-11-21 05:17] jamberine: if you went dd/dd/ca that transposes at the cost of your pivot I think
[2020-11-21 05:19] masn6811 (Masne98888): thats fine, is there any alt drones that let you scorch a turn earlier?
[2020-11-21 05:19] jamberine: the real benefit is not having to buy the 2nd conduit immediately
[2020-11-21 05:19] jamberine: you'd have to buy conduit animus on the same turn
[2020-11-21 05:19] masn6811 (Masne98888): thank goodness we're nerfing thorium. piviting to double scorch off evil animus is a bit spook

[2020-11-22 16:20] silentslayers: the main problem i've seen with pivot is p1's zem line of 1. DD 2. CC 3. Click Pivot + Zem
[2020-11-22 16:24] silentslayers: Just to re-iterate our current state after discussion yesterday, we decided botch at 3 LS instead of 4 LS is more elegant than 1 less health, and is still a substantial nerf. It makes blood pact not have to be changed (and also makes the edge case of blood pact being 1 less LS no longer an edge case which is nice).

We also discussed vore being 1 HP (wortel liked this idea in particular). I think allowing the botch tarsier opening after the botch nerf would be ok, and if we changed vore to 1 HP, you can no longer get a huge benefit out of opening vore tarsier, because you can't absorb on vore after they rhino. So i'm interested in hearing people's opinions on that. Vore would still be incredibly strong in case someone thinks otherwise. A large part of it's power is the vigilant engineer, and of course you start with 2 engis so it enables rushes well which can turn a lot of sets away from otherwise defensive situations into early game builds. I also think it's a little off brand that vore + engi is basically a superior splitter, and yet still is 3 HP. With this change, red can't make a 3 HP attacker, which can later be turned into 3 HP when defense becomes hard later. That also happens to feel more in flavor of red identity to me.
[2020-11-22 16:28] silentslayers: Regarding the smorcus proposition, I think I like the 6RR + RR better than 5RR + 1R for a click, and I also like it better than 6RR + 1R for click. I think 6RR does a great job of taking away the problems smorcus has, because it will be more clunky to fit it into faster builds. In particular it takes away the fastimus build where you can no longer afford Smorcus+DD, which should even the playing field. It may be a somewhat boring unit, but I think that's ok. Even at 6RR, there should be moments where buying smorcus' and animus' should be correct, right? The 1R click ability is a cool idea, and I think it would lend itself to interesting moments, but I think the fact that you could buy 2 of them on only 1 animus and have 4 threat (well 2, but you know what I mean) is pretty spooky.
[2020-11-22 16:35] silentslayers: Also going to drop some of the grimbotch inflation figures for those interested. I accidentally put them in #ask_a_dev earlier.

messages.content:
Just to re-iterate our current state after discussion yesterday, we decided botch at 3 LS instead of 4 LS is more elegant than 1 less health, and is still a substantial nerf. It makes blood pact not have to be changed (and also makes the edge case of blood pact being 1 less LS no longer an edge case which is nice).

We also discussed vore being 1 HP (wortel liked this idea in particular). I think allowing the botch tarsier opening after the botch nerf would be ok, and if we changed vore to 1 HP, you can no longer get a huge benefit out of opening vore tarsier, because you can't absorb on vore after they rhino. So i'm interested in hearing people's opinions on that. Vore would still be incredibly strong in case someone thinks otherwise. A large part of it's power is the vigilant engineer, and of course you start with 2 engis so it enables rushes well which can turn a lot of sets away from otherwise defensive situations into early game builds. I also think it's a little off brand that vore + engi is basically a superior splitter, and yet still is 3 HP. With this change, red can't make a 3 HP attacker, which can later be turned into 3 HP when defense becomes hard later. That also happens to feel more in flavor of red identity to me.

messages.author: silentslayers
messages.content: Regarding the smorcus proposition, I think I like the 6RR + RR better than 5RR + 1R for a click, and I also like it better than 6RR + 1R for click. I think 6RR does a great job of taking away the problems smorcus has, because it will be more clunky to fit it into faster builds. In particular it takes away the fastimus build where you can no longer afford Smorcus+DD, which should even the playing field. It may be a somewhat boring unit, but I think that's ok. Even at 6RR, there should be moments where buying smorcus' and animus' should be correct, right? The 1R click ability is a cool idea, and I think it would lend itself to interesting moments, but I think the fact that you could buy 2 of them on only 1 animus and have 4 threat (well 2, but you know what I mean) is pretty spooky.

threads.formatted_text:
--- Thread (17 messages, 2020-11-24) ---
[2020-11-24 03:29] masn6811 (Masne98888): wonderboat and i discussed on this
[2020-11-24 03:30] masn6811 (Masne98888): basically, we hate some of these 2-unit combos
[2020-11-24 03:30] masn6811 (Masne98888): but some are acceptable, since they appear only in like 1% of sets
[2020-11-24 03:30] masn6811 (Masne98888): lancetooth + any of drake/sentry/borehole is also a big one
[2020-11-24 03:31] masn6811 (Masne98888): we think the current patch addresses the most problematic units, and will very noticbly change the landscape of mata
[2020-11-24 03:31] masn6811 (Masne98888): and we want testing with that before rolling out any second wave of less urgent changes
[2020-11-24 03:32] masn6811 (Masne98888): 3gbrr antima is an option, its not the only option
[2020-11-24 03:32] masn6811 (Masne98888): antima has lots of interesting ways to rework, 8rr for example
[2020-11-24 03:33] masn6811 (Masne98888): 1gbrxe is a good meme
[2020-11-24 03:33] masn6811 (Masne98888): for bolt/venge, bolt is probably never getting change
[2020-11-24 03:33] masn6811 (Masne98888): venge changes are on the table (they're efficient for what they do, but conduit-expensive, so they need a green sink)
[2020-11-24 03:33] masn6811 (Masne98888): but its not a super high priority
[2020-11-24 03:34] masn6811 (Masne98888): if anything, the top unit on the table for a phase 2 change is lancetooth
[2020-11-24 03:34] masn6811 (Masne98888): there's a ton of possible ideas, im currently favoring a version that costs a single x
[2020-11-24 03:34] masn6811 (Masne98888): whether it be 8bx, 6bbx, 7bx and 2/3, etc.
[2020-11-24 03:35] masn6811 (Masne98888): that'll require testing to see what feels most fair
[2020-11-24 03:35] masn6811 (Masne98888): but yeah, i want to get the testing with the phase 1 changes before moving to phase 2
